- Online Catalog - Passive Heat Sink - Alpha Novatech: A heat sink with a dense fin pattern will always outperform a comparable heat sink with a sparser fin pattern at a given airflow. However, a denser fin pattern will generate a significantly higher pressure drop, requiring more powerful fans to generate a given airflow.

build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(60, 40, 1.5)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(8).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=1.5).rect(54, 34).extrude(1.5)

STEP 4: Add fins — 
    a) .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(27, 20).lineTo(27, -20).lineTo(36, -20).lineTo(36, 20).closePath().extrude(1.5)
    b) Repeat step a) for each fin at intervals of 4mm along the width and depth of the base plate
